title: Persons capable of giving or receiving
doc_html:
CHAPTER 2.  OF THE CAPACITY NECESSARY FOR DISPOSING

AND RECEIVING BY DONATION INTER VIVOS

OR MORTIS CAUSA

Art. 1470.  Persons capable of giving or receiving

All persons have capacity to make and receive donations inter vivos and mortis causa, except as expressly provided by law.

Acts 1991, No. 363, §1.
